description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Continuous Integration that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix strategy to test with Python versions 3.8, 3.9, 3.10 on ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, and macOs-latest environments for x64 architecture. For each job, check out the code, set up the Python environment, install dependencies from requirements.txt and requirements-test.txt, install the package, and run tests with pytest on both Unix-like and Windows systems.
